theme_archetype.name: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy
theme_archetype.reasoning: Fits a 40-year-old professional user. Earthy and sophisticated palette creates a premium, mature personal app feel. Avoids neon/cyber tech aesthetics and generic 'SaaS blue', grounding the user in calm productivity.

background.description: Pale Linen - used for the main app background to reduce eye strain.

surface.description: White for main content cards, Stone for secondary panels and AI insight blocks.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - used for primary CTAs, active bottom nav items, and structural elements.

ai_accent.description: Phosphor Bronze / Soft Terracotta. strictly NO PURPLE for AI. AI should feel like a crafted, premium insight. Use this for AI buttons, AI icons, and AI text highlights.

typography.notes: No Inter or generic sans for headings. Emphasize a modern editorial feel.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6).
spacing_and_layout.mobile_navigation: Bottom Navigation Bar with 5 icons (Education, Job, Investment, World, Quick Action). Fixed at bottom, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B 'Control Room'. grid-cols-1 on mobile. On desktop, grid-cols-3 or grid-cols-4. gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.cards: Neumorphism tactile variant but very clean: Flat solid surface (#FFFFFF), subtle 1px border border-[#E8E6E1], rounded-2xl. Soft ambient shadow only on hover shadow-sm.

login.layout: Clean, distraction-free center alignment. Large numeric keypad. No generic imagery.
login.features: 6-digit passcode dots, toggle ID/EN language top right.

education.card_elements: University image, deadline label, benefits, age limit filter. Prominent 'AI Insight' bronze button.

job.layout: Dense list view or compact cards.
job.card_elements: Company logo slot, salary range, role. AI salary insight panel.

investment.elements: Market overview (IHSG, Kurs, Emas) top row widgets. Stock cards with sparkline charts. AI Strategy highlights.

our_world.layout: Editorial news feed. Image on top, large serif/Outfit heading, muted date.
our_world.categories: Horizontal scrollable pill filters (Geopolitics, Tech, Best Cities, Culinary).

quick_action.elements: Custom checkbox, numbering/bullets, reminder toggle switch.

libraries: shadcn/ui (Buttons, Dialog, Input, Tabs, Switch, Slider, Card)

customizations.ai_insight_panel: bg-[#B76E38]/5 border border-[#B76E38]/20 rounded-xl p-4 flex gap-3 text-[#3A3937] text-sm
customizations.ai_button: border border-[#B76E38] text-[#B76E38] hover:bg-[#B76E38] hover:text-white rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm transition-all

image_urls.description: Jakarta morning skyline - use for the 'Info Jakarta' news card
Stock market chart - use as a visual header or widget background for the Investment tab
Modern university building - use for a prominent Master's scholarship card

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind config to add the custom colors: 'linen': '#F9F8F6', 'forest': '#2C4A3B', 'bronze': '#B76E38'.
Ensure 'Outfit' is loaded for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts.
Do NOT use pure purple or teal anywhere. Rely on the Forest Green and Phosphor Bronze palette.
Build a mobile-first layout with a sticky bottom navigation bar. On lg breakpoints, convert to a left sidebar.
Ensure all Shadcn components are stripped of their default 'Vercel' look (e.g., replace default ring colors with forest green, adjust border radii).
Implement the 6-digit passcode screen as the initial view. Default pin is 991285.
All media MUST use the URLs provided in the media section. Do not use placehold.it or dummy images.
